response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the provided lyrics for both 'Yumeiro Festival' and 'Hazukashiika Seishunwa'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for lyric accuracy and song credits. 3. Timing & Pacing: Applied aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions in rapid song sections (e.g., 03:25-03:35) to prevent cascading delays. Subtitled prominent on-screen credits for the second song.

subtitles.original: そんな感じで 良いさ！良いさ！
subtitles.english: Just like that, it's good! It's good!

subtitles.original: 夢のビートきざもうよ
subtitles.english: Let's carve out the beat of our dreams!

subtitles.original: さわげー！
subtitles.english: Make some noise!

subtitles.original: 咲き誇れ！君もヨイサ！ヨイサ！
subtitles.english: Bloom in full glory! You too, Yoisa! Yoisa!

subtitles.original: だから ここは最高のフェスティバル
subtitles.english: That's why this is the best festival!

subtitles.original: 祭囃子リズムで ノリノリさ
subtitles.english: Getting into the groove with the festival music!

subtitles.original: 笑顔満開➡︎無限大 It’s Alright!
subtitles.english: Smiles in full bloom to infinity, It’s Alright!

subtitles.original: 舞い踊れ！ ひぃふぅみぃで 染め上げて
subtitles.english: Dance! Dye it all in, one-two-three!

subtitles.original: 君色教えて 気になっちゃう color
subtitles.english: Show me your color, I'm curious about your color.

subtitles.original: そんな感じで 良いさ！良いさ！
subtitles.english: Just like that, it's good! It's good!

subtitles.original: 夢のビート聴かせてよ
subtitles.english: Let me hear the beat of your dreams!

subtitles.original: だから止まれない！
subtitles.english: So we can't stop!

subtitles.original: はっ！
subtitles.english: Ha!

subtitles.original: はっ！
subtitles.english: Ha!

subtitles.original: ソイヤ！
subtitles.english: Soiya!

subtitles.original: ソイヤ！
subtitles.english: Soiya!

subtitles.original: どっこいしょーどっこいしょ
subtitles.english: Heave-ho! Heave-ho!

subtitles.original: はーどっこい！
subtitles.english: Ha, dokkoi!

subtitles.original: 恥ずかしいか青春は / 作詞・作曲：長屋晴子
subtitles.english: [Song: Hazukashiika Seishunwa / Music & Lyrics: Haruko Nagaya]

subtitles.original: ぶつけたところから熟れていく果実のように
subtitles.english: Like a fruit that ripens from where it was bruised,

subtitles.original: 僕らは些細なことでへこたれたよな
subtitles.english: we used to get discouraged over trivial things, didn't we?

subtitles.original: かさぶたになれずに息せき切ってがむしゃらに
subtitles.english: Without becoming a scab, gasping for breath and recklessly,

subtitles.original: 輝く一等星をめがけて手を伸ばしたよな
subtitles.english: we reached out for the shining first-magnitude star, didn't we?

subtitles.original: 繊細されど大胆だ
subtitles.english: Delicate, yet bold.

subtitles.original: うるさい これが切り札だ
subtitles.english: Shut up, this is our trump card!

subtitles.original: 泣き虫されど熱血だ
subtitles.english: Crybaby, yet hot-blooded.

subtitles.original: うるさい これが持ち味だ
subtitles.english: Shut up, this is our style!

subtitles.original: 未開拓冒険地帯∴好奇心旺盛時代
subtitles.english: Uncharted adventure zone ∴ Era of intense curiosity.

subtitles.original: 何が綺麗かは分かる 見る目ならばある
subtitles.english: I know what's beautiful. I've got a good eye for it.

subtitles.original: 恥ずかしいか青春は
subtitles.english: Are you embarrassed of your youth?

subtitles.original: 馬鹿らしいか真剣は
subtitles.english: Is being serious ridiculous to you?

subtitles.original: 僕ら全力でやってんだ
subtitles.english: We're giving it our absolute all!

subtitles.original: 振りかざせ存在を
subtitles.english: Flaunt your existence,

subtitles.original: 掻き乱せ心臓を
subtitles.english: and stir up your heart!

subtitles.original: あとどれくらい続いていくだろう
subtitles.english: I wonder how much longer this will continue.

subtitles.original: 守り抜いた青春が何よりもの贅沢だ
subtitles.english: The youth we've protected is the greatest luxury of all.

subtitles.original: きっといつか焦がれ思い返す
subtitles.english: Surely, one day, we'll look back with longing.

subtitles.original: 名前のない関係を 捨てきれない感情を
subtitles.english: Relationships without names, emotions we can't throw away...

subtitles.original: 何気ない今日を忘れないでね
subtitles.english: Don't forget this ordinary day.

subtitles.original: 悩んでた種の色が昨日とはまるで違うとか
subtitles.english: The color of the seeds you worried about is completely different from yesterday.

subtitles.original: そんなの日常茶飯事だね
subtitles.english: Things like that happen every day, don't they?

subtitles.original: 心は素直のようだ
subtitles.english: The heart seems to be honest.

subtitles.original: 戦友だとか親友は
subtitles.english: Whether we're comrades or best friends,

subtitles.original: うるさい どれも正解だ
subtitles.english: shut up, any of those are correct.

subtitles.original: 初恋だとか失恋は
subtitles.english: Whether it's first love or heartbreak,

subtitles.original: うるさい どれも宝石だ
subtitles.english: shut up, they're all gems.
